query:
UPDATE cpa_project_consultants 
SET design_fee_amount=NULL, design_fee_method=NULL, design_fee_percentage=NULL,
    supervision_fee_amount=NULL, supervision_fee_method=NULL, supervision_fee_percentage=NULL,
    supervision_stated_duration_months=NULL, supervision_submitted=0,
    import_json=NULL, status='DRAFT'
WHERE consultant_id = (SELECT id FROM cpa_consultants_master WHERE code='LACASA')
AND cpa_project_id = 120003;
